name: Hot Mexican Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a blender jar.
2. Process briefly until blended but not smooth.
3. Cover and refrigerate.
Helpful Hints:
If you prefer a chunkier sauce, blend only half the onion, chili peppers, and coriander with the tomatoes. Finely chop the remaining onion, chili peppers, and coriander and add them to the blended sauce. Keeps well in the refrigerator. This is a very hot salsa. Use less cayenne pepper if desired. The amount of coriander may also be varied to suit your taste.
